title: FideX J-MDN — JSON Message Disposition Notification
description: Cryptographically-signed receipt issued by the Hub after successful message delivery. Two stages: Technical (NETWORK_DELIVERED, < 2 s) and Fiscal (FISCAL_CLEARED, < 61 min after DLT anchoring). / Recibo firmado criptográficamente emitido por el Hub tras la entrega del mensaje. Dos etapas: Técnica (NETWORK_DELIVERED, < 2 s) y Fiscal (FISCAL_CLEARED, < 61 min tras el anclaje DLT).

jmdn_version.description: J-MDN format version. Fixed at '1.0' for this specification release. / Versión del formato J-MDN. Fijo en '1.0' para esta versión de la especificación.

status.description: Receipt stage. NETWORK_DELIVERED = payload received, decrypted, and schema-validated (< 2 s). FISCAL_CLEARED = Merkle Proof anchored on DLT (< 61 min). / Etapa del recibo. NETWORK_DELIVERED = payload recibido, descifrado y validado contra esquema (< 2 s). FISCAL_CLEARED = Merkle Proof anclado en DLT (< 61 min).

message_id.description: The message_id from the kontext_routing envelope of the original document being acknowledged. / El message_id del sobre kontext_routing del documento original que se acusa recibo.

document_ref.description: Human-readable reference of the original document (e.g. invoice number, order number). / Referencia legible del documento original (ej. número de factura, número de orden).

payload_hash_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the raw payload bytes received. Used as the Merkle leaf hash in the hourly rollup. / Resumen SHA-256 en hex de los bytes del payload recibido. Se usa como hash hoja en el rollup horario Merkle.

receiver_gln.description: GLN (13 digits) of the receiving party issuing this J-MDN. / GLN (13 dígitos) de la parte receptora que emite este J-MDN.

jws_signature.description: Compact JWS serialization (RFC 7515) of this entire receipt, signed with the Hub's ES256 signing key. This field is excluded from the signed payload (computed after serialization). / Serialización JWS compacta (RFC 7515) de este recibo completo, firmado con la clave ES256 del Hub. Este campo se excluye del payload firmado (calculado tras la serialización).

received_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the payload was received and validated. Present only on NETWORK_DELIVERED receipts. / Timestamp UTC ISO 8601 de recepción y validación del payload. Presente solo en recibos NETWORK_DELIVERED.

cleared_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the Merkle Proof was anchored on the DLT. Present only on FISCAL_CLEARED receipts. / Timestamp UTC ISO 8601 del anclaje del Merkle Proof en el DLT. Presente solo en recibos FISCAL_CLEARED.

merkle_proof.description: Merkle inclusion proof enabling the sender to independently verify on-chain anchoring. Required on FISCAL_CLEARED receipts. / Prueba de inclusión Merkle que permite al emisor verificar el anclaje on-chain de forma independiente. Requerida en recibos FISCAL_CLEARED.

leaf_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the document payload bytes — the leaf node in the Merkle tree. Must equal payload_hash_sha256. / SHA-256 hex de los bytes del payload del documento — nodo hoja en el árbol Merkle. Debe ser igual a payload_hash_sha256.

tree_root.description: Merkle tree root hash that was anchored on-chain. Verifier recomputes this from proof_path + leaf_hash. / Hash raíz del árbol Merkle anclado on-chain. El verificador lo recalcula con proof_path + leaf_hash.

proof_path.description: Ordered sibling hashes from leaf to root. Apply each in sequence to recompute tree_root. / Hashes hermanos ordenados de hoja a raíz. Aplicarlos en secuencia permite recalcular tree_root.

position.description: Whether this sibling hash is concatenated on the left or right when hashing upward. / Si este hash hermano se concatena a la izquierda o la derecha al calcular el hash hacia arriba.

hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the sibling Merkle node. / SHA-256 hex del nodo hermano en el árbol Merkle.

anchored_at_block.description: Block number on the FideX DLT where the Merkle root was anchored via anchorHourlyRollup(). / Número de bloque en el DLT de FideX donde la raíz Merkle fue anclada via anchorHourlyRollup().

anchor_tx_hash.description: Transaction hash of the anchorHourlyRollup() call on the IFideXAnchor smart contract. / Hash de la transacción de la llamada anchorHourlyRollup() en el smart contract IFideXAnchor.

anchor_timestamp.description: UTC timestamp of the on-chain anchoring transaction, as recorded by the DLT node. / Timestamp UTC de la transacción de anclaje on-chain, registrado por el nodo DLT.

observer_registration_id.description: SENIAT registration ID assigned by the Government Observer Node after successful Targeted Tax Manifest delivery. Only present when the Observer ACK has been received. / ID de registro SENIAT asignado por el Nodo Observador Gubernamental tras la entrega exitosa del Tax Manifest. Solo presente si se recibió el ACK del Observador.
